task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the title slide with the correct title, subtitle, and speaker notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide 1 should display the title 'The Iron Web: Rails and Telegraphs' and subtitle 'Fall 2026 Exhibition Proposal'. The speaker notes section at the bottom of the screen should contain text mentioning 'Miller Foundation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of an overview slide with bullet points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide 2 should be visible in the main view or thumbnail pane containing a bulleted list outlining the exhibition overview.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of four individual artifact slides with images and descriptions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slides 3, 4, 5, and 6 should be visible (either in the main view or the left-hand thumbnail pane), each containing a distinct artifact image, a title/name, and descriptive text.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Proposed Floor Plan' slide with the gallery image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide 7 should have the title 'Proposed Floor Plan' (or similar) and contain an embedded image of a gallery or floor plan.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Budget Breakdown' slide containing a financial table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide 8 should display a table containing the budget figures: Curation ($45,000), Fabrication ($85,000), Marketing ($20,000), and Total ($150,000).

task_completion.description: Verify the presentation is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ONLYOFFICE window title bar or a 'Save As' dialog should show the filename 'exhibition_proposal.pptx'. The directory path should indicate '~/Documents/Presentations/'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the ONLYOFFICE Presentation Editor GUI to create the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ONLYOFFICE interface being actively used (e.g., navigating menus, inserting images, typing text), rather than a terminal window running a script to generate the .pptx file.

integrity.description: Ensure images were actually inserted into the presentation slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: Images should appear embedded within the slide canvas in ONLYOFFICE, complete with bounding boxes or resizing handles, rather than just being opened in a separate image viewer.

integrity.description: Ensure the budget breakdown is formatted as an actual table.
integrity.visual_evidence: The budget data on slide 8 should be structured in a grid/table format using ONLYOFFICE's table tool, not just plain text with spaces or tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/exhibition_proposal.pptx'. The presentation must contain exactly 8 slides and 5 distinct images (4 artifacts, 1 floor plan). The speaker notes for the first slide must mention 'Miller Foundation'.
